name: coTfsLssSendConfigureNodeIdRequest
title: coTfsLssSendConfigureNodeIdRequest
syntax: long coTfsLssSendConfigureNodeIdRequest( dword NID, byte[] pErrorCode, byte[] pSpecificError );
description: This function sends a configure LSS configure node-ID request and waits for the response.

parameters.name: NID
parameters.description: node-ID of the device under test (DUT), value range 1..127 and 255

parameters.name: pErrorCode
parameters.description: error code 0 - protocol successfully completed1 - node-ID out of range255 - implementation specific error occurred

parameters.name: pSpecificError
parameters.description: manufacturer specific error (used if error code = 255)

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
